name: omena-css
description: Go to Definition, Hover, Autocomplete, Diagnostics, Quick Fixes, and Find References for classnames/bind cx() patterns with CSS Modules.

scripts.build: pnpm omena-check run core/clean && rolldown -c rolldown.config.ts && pnpm omena-check run core/build/engine-shadow-runner && pnpm omena-check run core/build/omena-lsp-server && pnpm omena-check run core/build/tsgo-binary
scripts.build:omena-wasm: wasm-pack build rust/crates/omena-wasm --scope omena --target bundler --out-dir pkg && node ./scripts/finalize-omena-wasm-pkg.mjs
scripts.check:eslint-plugin-smoke: pnpm exec tsc -b server/engine-core-ts server/engine-host-node && node --import tsx ./scripts/check-eslint-plugin-smoke.ts

scripts.check:ts7-phase-b-editing-tsgo: OMENA_TYPE_FACT_BACKEND=tsgo pnpm exec vitest run test/protocol/references.test.ts test/protocol/rename.test.ts test/protocol/code-actions.test.ts

omena.features.definition.description: Enable Go to Definition for cx() class names.

omena.features.hover.description: Enable hover information for cx() class names.

omena.features.references.description: Enable Find References for CSS class selectors.

omena.features.rename.description: Enable Rename Symbol for CSS class selectors across SCSS and TS/TSX files.

omena.diagnostics.severity.description: Severity level for unresolved class diagnostics.

omena.diagnostics.unusedSelector.description: Show hints for CSS class selectors that are declared but never referenced in any TS/TSX file.

omena.diagnostics.missingModule.description: Warn when 'import styles from ...' for a CSS Module cannot be resolved on disk.

omena.hover.maxCandidates.description: Maximum template/variable candidates shown in hover.

omena.typeFactBackend.markdownDescription: Type-fact backend used by the language server. `tsgo` uses the extension-bundled TS 7 native compiler and does not build a synchronous current-TS program on the LSP request path. `tsgo-workspace` uses `pnpm exec tsgo` in the user workspace.

omena.lspServerRuntime.markdownDescription: Language-server runtime. `auto` uses the bundled or built Rust `omena-lsp-server` and fails fast if no binary is available. `omena-lsp-server` requires the bundled binary, explicit `OMENA_LSP_SERVER_PATH`, or explicit `OMENA_LSP_SERVER_COMMAND` command.

omena.pathAlias.markdownDescription: Resource-scoped import alias map for CSS Module paths. Keys are non-relative import prefixes, values are workspace-relative or absolute target paths.

omena.scss.classnameTransform.markdownDescription: Mirror of css-loader's `modules.localsConvention`. Controls how CSS class selectors are exposed to JS/TS — e.g. `.btn-primary` is reachable as `styles['btn-primary']` (`asIs`), both that and `styles.btnPrimary` (`camelCase`), or only `styles.btnPrimary` (`camelCaseOnly`). Port your `css-loader` setting verbatim.
